name: Haemophilus Influenzae Type b (Hib) Vaccine Codes
description: CVX and CPT codes for Haemophilus influenzae type b (Hib) conjugate vaccines. Used in childhood immunization (CIS) measures. Requires 3-4 doses depending on product (PRP-OMP 3 doses; PRP-T 4 doses).
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Haemophilus influenzae type b vaccine, conjugate unspecified formulation

Haemophilus influenzae type b vaccine, HbOC conjugate
Haemophilus influenzae type b vaccine, PRP-T conjugate (ActHIB, Hiberix)
Haemophilus influenzae type b vaccine, PRP-OMP conjugate (PedvaxHIB)
DTaP-Haemophilus influenzae type b conjugate vaccine
Haemophilus influenzae type b conjugate and Hepatitis B vaccine (Comvax)
DTaP-IPV vaccine (may include Hib component in some combination)
Haemophilus influenzae type b vaccine (Hib), PRP-OMP conjugate, 3 dose schedule, for intramuscular use
Haemophilus influenzae type b vaccine (Hib), PRP-T conjugate, 4 dose schedule, for intramuscular use
